ai_onboarding_intro.zh: 只保留一份 onboarding 真相源，并坚持 owner account + trusted device：
ai_onboarding_intro.en: Keep onboarding truth narrow, with owner account + trusted device:

zh: - 面向产品的公开测试: [docs/public-testnet-guide.md](/Users/wutongcheng/Desktop/Net/oasyce-net/docs/public-testnet-guide.md)
- 部署边界说明: [docs/DEPLOYMENT_BOUNDARY.md](/Users/wutongcheng/Desktop/Net/oasyce-net/docs/DEPLOYMENT_BOUNDARY.md)
- 链侧接入和基础设施: [chain.oasyce](https://chain.oasyce.com)
- 当前入口: 只保留 AI 需要的简洁命令参考，不再展开多套并行流程
en: - Product-facing public beta: [docs/public-testnet-guide.md](/Users/wutongcheng/Desktop/Net/oasyce-net/docs/public-testnet-guide.md)
- Deployment boundary: [docs/DEPLOYMENT_BOUNDARY.md](/Users/wutongcheng/Desktop/Net/oasyce-net/docs/DEPLOYMENT_BOUNDARY.md)
- Chain-side onboarding and infra context: [chain.oasyce](https://chain.oasyce.com)
- This surface: concise AI command reference only, not a second parallel onboarding guide

zh: export OASYCE_NETWORK_MODE=testnet
export OASYCE_STRICT_CHAIN=1
oas account status --json
oas doctor --public-beta --json
oas smoke public-beta --json
en: export OASYCE_NETWORK_MODE=testnet
export OASYCE_STRICT_CHAIN=1
oas account status --json
oas doctor --public-beta --json
oas smoke public-beta --json

zh: oas --json sandbox status
oas --json sandbox onboard
oas sandbox reset --force
en: oas --json sandbox status
oas --json sandbox onboard
oas sandbox reset --force

readme_intro.zh: 公开测试的**唯一产品入口文档**在 [docs/public-testnet-guide.md](/Users/wutongcheng/Desktop/Net/oasyce-net/docs/public-testnet-guide.md)。真实链上接入请看 [chain.oasyce](https://chain.oasyce.com) 的链侧说明。部署边界见 [docs/DEPLOYMENT_BOUNDARY.md](/Users/wutongcheng/Desktop/Net/oasyce-net/docs/DEPLOYMENT_BOUNDARY.md)：VPS 跑链和公共基础设施，`oasyce-net` 默认仍是用户侧客户端。身份模型现在收敛为 **owner account + trusted device**：主设备先 `oas bootstrap`，第二台设备优先 `oas device join`。`oas sandbox *` 只负责本地沙盒模拟，不代表真实公网测试网接入。
readme_intro.en: The **single product-facing public beta guide** lives at [docs/public-testnet-guide.md](/Users/wutongcheng/Desktop/Net/oasyce-net/docs/public-testnet-guide.md). For real public testnet onboarding, follow the chain-side guide on [chain.oasyce](https://chain.oasyce.com). See [docs/DEPLOYMENT_BOUNDARY.md](/Users/wutongcheng/Desktop/Net/oasyce-net/docs/DEPLOYMENT_BOUNDARY.md) for the deployment boundary: the VPS runs chain and shared infra, while `oasyce-net` remains a user-side client by default. The identity model is now **owner account + trusted device**: primary devices start with `oas bootstrap`, and secondary devices attach with `oas device join`. `oas sandbox *` is only the local sandbox simulation and is not real public testnet onboarding.

zh: oas --json sandbox status   # 查看本地沙盒状态
oas --json sandbox onboard  # 本地模拟：faucet + 示例资产 + 质押
oas sandbox reset --force   # 重置本地沙盒
oas device join --account <ACCOUNT_ADDRESS> --readonly   # 第二台设备接入同一账号
oas device revoke   # 撤销这台机器的 trusted-device 授权
oas doctor --public-beta --json   # 公测发布 gate
en: oas --json sandbox status   # Inspect the local sandbox state
oas --json sandbox onboard  # Local simulation: faucet + sample asset + stake
oas sandbox reset --force   # Reset local sandbox data
oas device join --account <ACCOUNT_ADDRESS> --readonly   # attach a second device to the same account
oas device revoke   # revoke this machine's trusted-device authorization
oas doctor --public-beta --json   # public beta release gate

zh: - 这次公测是 AI-first。长期用户是 agent，dashboard 只是临时的人机协作界面。
- 真正开始使用前，先跑 `oas bootstrap`，让 agent 自动升级 Oasyce + DataVault、确保钱包已就绪，并把这台机器切成 managed install。
- 身份模型现在收敛为 `owner account + trusted device`：设备先决定能不能代表账号写链，`agent/session` 先只做审计标签。
- 真实公开测试网身份接入目前仍以链侧文档为准；`oas sandbox *` 只是本地沙盒模拟命令。
- 第二台设备如果要接入同一个经济账号，优先使用 `oas device join`；不要直接裸跑默认 `oas bootstrap`。
- 如果一台设备不再可信，直接运行 `oas device revoke` 撤销它的 trusted-device 授权。
- 第一条安全主路径: 注册一个资产 -> 请求报价 -> 用 Idempotency-Key 买一次 -> 校验持仓。
- 成功的定义: 返回 trace_id，状态可被机器判定，并且能从持仓或交易记录验证结果。
- 如果 buy 超时，不要盲目再次发起第二笔金融动作。复用同一个 Idempotency-Key，或先查看 support 数据。
- Dashboard 首屏现在支持两种人工路径：准备这台设备，或接入已有账号。真正的身份入口不再藏在零散命令里。
- 在邀请新的 beta 用户前，先跑 `oas smoke public-beta --json`，把 doctor + 核心交易链路一起走通。
en: - This beta is AI-first. The long-term user is an agent; the dashboard is a temporary collaboration surface.
- Before real work, run `oas bootstrap` so the agent upgrades Oasyce + DataVault, ensures a wallet exists, and turns this machine into a managed install.
- The identity model is now `owner account + trusted device`: the device decides whether it may write for the account; `agent/session` remain audit labels for now.
- Real public testnet identity onboarding still follows the chain docs; `oas sandbox *` commands are local simulation commands for sandbox testing.
- If a second device should join the same economic account, use `oas device join` first; do not start with a naked default `oas bootstrap`.
- If a machine should no longer be trusted, run `oas device revoke` to revoke its trusted-device authorization.
- First safe path: register one asset -> quote it -> buy it once with an Idempotency-Key -> verify holdings.
- Success means: the action returns a trace_id, the status is machine-readable, and the result can be verified from holdings or transactions.
- If buy times out, do not submit a second financial action blindly. Reuse the same Idempotency-Key or inspect support data first.
- The dashboard home screen now supports two manual paths: prepare this device, or join an existing account. Identity onboarding is no longer hidden behind scattered commands.
- Before inviting a new beta user, run `oas smoke public-beta --json` so the doctor gate and core financial flow pass together.
